content:
1. Monthly article report generator. Fetches articles by date range, optionally filters categories in Python, does per-article author lookups, builds summaries + aggregates. Shipped for demo; noted N+1 scaling problem.

2. N+1 DB calls (authors); date math for month end (Dec case); category filter done in app layer; no author-missing handling.

3. Optimization approach (batch authors vs. push filter to SQL).

4. Author not found, bad month/year, empty results, DB failures, timezone issues, very large result sets.
